PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?episodeDate WHERE {
  ?episode wdt:P31 wd:Q19110198 ; wdt:P1545 wd:Q52670 ; wdt:P577 ?episodeDate .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?episodeDate)
LIMIT 1
